title: QC LIMS Specialist (CSV/ Pharma/ Contract)
description:
QC LIMS Specialist (CSV/ Pharma/ Contract)

6 Months Contract

Location : Tuas

Industry : Pharmaceutical


Job Purpose

We are seeking a QC LIMS Specialist to support the implementation and validation of a Laboratory Information Management System within a GMP QC environment. The role will partner with QC, IT, and QA to ensure compliant system deployment, user adoption, and ongoing SOP governance.

Responsibilities
Implementation of LIMS (Laboratory Information Management System) in QC, alongside with the following activities:

  1. Master Data Collection
  2. Write and execute LIMS IQ (Installation Qualification) Test Cases
  3. Write and execute LIMS UAT (User Acceptance Test)
  4. Write LIMS-related SOPs, including update/ revision.
  5. Conduct end user training

    Requirements:

    • Bachelor’s or Master’s Degree in Pharmaceutical Sciences, related life Sciences or IT/ Technology with minimally 2-3 years of experience in QC, preferably in QC Systems.



    Lim Pey Chyi - Apple.lim@manpower.com.sg

    Recruitment Consultant (R2090579)

    Manpower Staffing Services (S) Pte Ltd

    EA Licence: 02C3423

postedCompany.description:
Manpower® is a global leader in contingent staffing and permanent resourcing, providing companies with strategic and operational flexibility and creating talent at scale.

As part of ManpowerGroup®, the world leader in innovative workforce solutions, we deliver high-impact strategies that help organizations achieve their business goals and enhance competitiveness.

Since 1996, Manpower Singapore has partnered with businesses to provide a continuum of staffing solutions—from incidental to strategic—helping them win in a rapidly changing world of work. At the same time, we empower jobseekers to find roles that match their skills and ambitions.
